scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/assets --shell=bun build && bun run --cwd packages/types --shell=bun build && bun run --cwd packages/schemas --shell=bun build && bun run --cwd packages/utils --shell=bun build
scripts.lint:architecture: bun run lint:feature-public-imports && bunx dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs apps/mobile packages
scripts.typecheck:packages: bun run --cwd packages/assets --shell=bun typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/types --shell=bun typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/schemas --shell=bun typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/utils --shell=bun typecheck
scripts.typecheck: bun run build:packages && bun run typecheck:packages && bun run --cwd apps/mobile --shell=bun typecheck
scripts.test: bun run test:brands && bun run test:bootstrap-registry && bun run test:feature-public-imports && bun run test:file-size && bun run test:theme-colors && bun run test:complexity && bun run test:mobile
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run lint:brands && bun run lint:mobile && bun run lint:complexity && bun run lint:file-size && bun run lint:theme-colors && bun run lint:architecture && bun run typecheck && bun run test
